raw_consumer_statement:
I sold some tickets on XXXX XXXX, I sent the tickets XXXX  satisfactory proof that they asked for. They called me and said there was an issue XXXX  asked if I could resend them with new proof, I said no problem XXXX  complied. The rep said " yes you sent It correctly everything is good on your end ''. Then they called me again, AFTER the event started, saying they were having issues again, I told them the event started but even so I complied. They never accepted my tickets so I lost the tickets XXXX  did not get paid. 

THEN THEY CHARGED ON MY CREIDT CARD WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION AS A FINE on top of not paying me.. 

per XXXX policy they say they can issue these charges/fines if the seller backs out of the deals. However, I have submitted all proof XXXX  XXXX exactly as they had asked for it, each time they have asked for it, as well as AMERICAN EXPRESS. I have been very diligent XXXX  ensure I have done everything correctly from XXXX XXXX  within XXXX policy XXXX  everything I entered was correct. 

I want XXXX  be clear that the order was not canceled on my end XXXX  the tickets were not accepted at no fault of my own.
